clusters.justification: These terms co-activate largely within insular, amygdalar, and anterior cingulate networks, representing the broad functional axis of emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and subjective feeling states.

Anchored by striatal, orbitofrontal, and ventromedial prefrontal co-activations, this cluster encapsulates the macro-level computation of reward, incentive motivation, and cost-benefit decision-making.

Tethered to the default mode network, these terms represent the internally directed, high-level functional domain responsible for constructing models of the self, simulating the minds of others, and processing interpersonal dynamics.
